release_notes:
Version 2.7.10 - Facebook Interaction Stabilization (Posts & Reels)
✨ New Features & Fixes:
- Facebook: Implemented Universal Dialog Locking for Post Popups (Regular & Group).
- Facebook: Added Icon-Validated Like Selector to precisely target main actions while ignoring comment links.
- Facebook: Extended full support for Reels (Overlay controls & Sidebar activation).
- Core: Hardened interaction logic with Multi-Event JS Dispatching (MouseDown/Up/Click) and Enter Key Simulation.
- Core: Resolved persistent 'element click intercepted' and incorrect targeting errors in dynamic layouts.
